title: Dean’s Message
content:
Dean’s Message

Welcome to the Doğuş University Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences website!

Our faculty is positioned at the intersection of engineering and natural sciences, aiming to educate individuals who can adapt to the rapidly changing world, question, produce, and develop solutions. Our educational philosophy is based on the principles of analytical thinking, creativity, ethical values, and social responsibility. We aim to equip our students not only with professional knowledge but also with a multifaceted perspective and strong communication skills.

Today, the rapid transformation of science and technology has made interdisciplinary work a necessity. In this regard, the educational programs conducted in our faculty have a structure that integrates theory and practice, bringing together research and application. Throughout their education, our students have the opportunity to apply the knowledge they acquire to real problems through projects, internships, and industry collaborations.

Our departments, with their strong academic staff and up-to-date curriculum, educate graduates who can compete at both national and international levels. Our MÜDEK accreditation processes and quality-oriented approach ensure the continuous improvement of our educational standards. While offering our students opportunities to explore different disciplines and gain international experience through programs such as Erasmus, double majors, and minors; we also support them in developing leadership, teamwork, and entrepreneurial skills through student clubs and social activities.

As Doğuş University Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences, our goal is to educate individuals who contribute to science, add value to society, and shape the future.

I wish all our students a successful academic life.

Prof. Dr. Doğan ERBAHAR

Acting Dean
